title: leucanthemum graminifolium
intro: Leucanthemum graminifolium, also known as the grass-leaved or annual daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Leucanthemum graminifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. Leucanthemum graminifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat digestive issues and skin conditions.
